Not sure If I missed that part in the description, but as far as I understand, 13 is the default DMG which can be increased through buffs, but where does x2 come from?
number of tentacle hits
you get one per tentacle (there's 2 in that pic, thus x2), though you also get additional tentacle hits for every exalt you did that turn
Oh stupid me, I didn't count the biggest tentacle, I thought only the small ones count...thanks <:flop1:1356083604236800030>
What does "enjoys 2x STR bonus" mean here? If I use that card, he deals 8 dmg, not 16...am I slow again? 😭
STR stacks are applied as additional flat damage (so if your card did 5 damage base and you had 3 STR, it would do 5 base damage (multiplied by any damage modifiers you had) + 3 more damage from STR
the "enjoys 2x STR bonus" just means the effect of STR is multiplied by 2x (so it'd become base damage + 6 damage from STR in the above case)
Ahh I see
Thank you
